parameters.query:
SELECT
  gm.id            AS match_id,
  gm.user_id,
  gm.grant_id,
  gm.pipeline_stage,
  p.email,
  o.name           AS org_name,
  g.title          AS grant_title,
  g.funder         AS grant_funder,
  g.deadline,
  g.url            AS grant_url,
  g.max_award,
  -- Days until deadline (integer)
  (g.deadline::date - CURRENT_DATE)::int AS days_remaining
FROM grant_matches gm
JOIN profiles      p  ON p.id        = gm.user_id
JOIN organisations o  ON o.user_id   = gm.user_id
JOIN grants        g  ON g.id        = gm.grant_id
WHERE
  g.deadline IS NOT NULL
  AND g.deadline::date BETWEEN CURRENT_DATE AND CURRENT_DATE + INTERVAL '30 days'
  AND gm.pipeline_stage NOT IN ('won', 'lost', 'no_action')
  AND g.is_active = true
ORDER BY g.deadline ASC;
